name: ana-hr-operations
description: High-standard client, recruiting, document, pricing, and invoice operations for Ana's HR company.

interface.longDescription: Capture a first client call once, then create approved kickoffs, job descriptions, offers, pricing, and invoice drafts with Google Docs template fidelity and human gates.
defaultPrompt: Run a first client kickoff and create the engagement record.
Create a job description in Ana's approved Google Docs template.
Draft the offer, price breakdown, and invoice for Ana's review.
